The game is so pay to win. It scammed me out of my money, there is no cosmetics to buy, and the game is just filled with 9 year olds who use speedboost and long arms because they are doo doo at the actual game. You guys are so freaking greedy. 

Would no recommend playing if you want to get a virus on your Quest 3 because after downloading this game, my screen went black and shut down. Unfortunately, my quest 3 was fried and I had to buy a new headset. Thank you, omny.

Platforms are buggy, and ghost monke is not working. Watch will open up frequently. Bark menu will also open up frequently, even without beating your chest like a gorilla. Not satisfied at all.

I don't recommend.

developer_response.body:
Hello, it seems you have had a bad experience. There is no virus contained int he game. You have just experience your headset overheating.

Yea, the mod menus are buggy, we are working on fixing those up.

And this game is meant for modding, so if it’s not for you then don’t play it.

Ty for your review.

developer_response.body: we never force you to rate the game, we say if people would like to rate the game they can get a mod menu: and since you can’t use voice chat, it’s because the servers are overloaded with players.
